title: FinanceRepository and Use Cases
objective: Implement FinanceRepository wrapping all DAOs and the five domain use cases. Use cases must be pure Kotlin with no Android framework dependencies.
execution_steps: Create FinanceRepository as Hilt @Singleton wrapping AccountDao, TransactionDao, CategoryDao, ProjectDao
Expose Flow-based reads and suspend writes for all entities
Implement GetAccountBalancesUseCase: query TransactionDao, compute balance per account by summing credits minus debits per type direction (ADR-003)
Implement SaveTransactionUseCase: validate mandatory category+account, persist single row (FR-001, FR-002)
Implement SaveSplitReceiptUseCase: validate sum<=total, generate receipt_group_id UUID, insertAll in @Transaction (FR-003)
Implement SaveTransferUseCase: validate distinct accounts, generate transfer_linked_id UUID, insert both legs atomically in @Transaction (FR-004)
Implement ReconcileAccountUseCase: compute discrepancy, create RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT or REVALUATION row (FR-010/011/012)
Wire RepositoryModule Hilt provider for FinanceRepository
Write unit tests for SaveSplitReceiptUseCase (sum validation, group ID assignment) and GetAccountBalancesUseCase (balance direction logic)
definition_of_done: All 5 use cases are pure Kotlin (no Android imports)
GetAccountBalancesUseCase correctly handles all 6 transaction types
